codeReview.summary: The feature implementation satisfies the export CLI requirements: format selection, --fps and --output flags, clear missing-cut-list behavior, default output under data_dir/exports, and broad test coverage across EDL/FCPXML/DaVinci plus storage-backed pipeline scenarios. I found one non-blocking UX inconsistency in help text.

issues.description: The --output help text says the default is `<cut-list-id>.<format-extension>`, but implementation now defaults to `<data_dir>/exports/<cut-list-id><ext>` (see lines 447-451). This can mislead users about where files are written when --output is omitted.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The backend-worker skill's RED-first instruction is ambiguous for CLI features that already exist; this worker edited implementation before adding tests but reported `followedProcedure: true`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton shows edits to snipsnap/cli.py before the large test additions in tests/test_cli.py; handoff.skillFeedback includes `followedProcedure: true` plus a suggested skill change about RED-first flexibility.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Test/runtime artifact handling for export outputs is not clearly documented in shared state, which can leave confusing untracked files in the repo root.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Session context shows `?? test-uuid-1234.edl` in git status, and handoff.discoveredIssues explicitly notes root-level EDL artifact accumulation from prior default path behavior.

summary: Reviewed cli-export commit 0818d12, transcript skeleton, and shared-state docs. The feature is functionally complete and well-tested for required behaviors; status is pass with one non-blocking help-text mismatch and two shared-state observations.
